final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a sign during the broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact UI details and stylistic execution are yours
Composition: must be a 9:16 vertical full-screen 抖音 live-stream interface with typical live-stream UI overlays (viewer count, comments, gifts, username bar)
Subject: must include a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: must include a live-stream room setting appropriate for 抖音
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, well-lit live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the subject; must include typical 抖音 live-stream UI text elements (viewer count, comment bar, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio; sign text must be clearly legible; 抖音 live-stream UI chrome must be visible
Avoid:
